text.tspan: Okay, Louisiana is extremely flawed
Friends, communities, families and I have
all been impacted by major gaps in
environmental educational and
governmental quality in Louisiana. I have
such a great love and admiration for
my communities and I really would love
to stay to improve and build better
systems for us. However, I am not
going to be another generation to
invest time and labor into a sinking hole.
We put too much power in the word
resilience as if living in a constant
state of crisis makes us extra special
for barely surviving it. If our systems
weren't so flawed maybe I would not
have had to rely on my community for
help. Just because I am resilient does
not mean I have to tolerate it
This is Leaving Louisiana,
Thank you,
- ella
